Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
12 
CONDITION_CATEGORY_10 
LABEL: 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 10 (Severe Hematologic Disorders) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for severe hematologic disorders (Condition Category 
10). 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for this Condition
